title: Tech-debt audit finding
description: Single finding produced by the weekly tech-debt audit pipeline. Used as the item schema inside the `report_findings` tool call returned by the Anthropic Batches API.

severity.description: Severity tier for this finding. STYLE findings are filtered out at runtime; include here so model output validates if the model produces one.

category.description: Sub-classification of the finding. Use 'other' only when no other value fits, and always populate `category_detail` in that case.

category_detail.description: Human-readable detail when category is 'other'. Required (non-empty) if category=='other'; null otherwise.

file.description: Repo-relative path of the file the finding applies to (e.g., 'ml-automation-llm/agents/llm-evaluator.md').

line.description: 1-based line number where the finding starts. Null for whole-file findings (e.g., a missing file, orphan file, or manifest-level issue).

message.description: What the issue is, in one or two sentences. Concrete and actionable. Avoid hedging language ('might', 'could be').

suggested_fix.description: Optional concrete fix suggestion. Code snippet OK. Null if the fix is non-obvious or context-dependent.

effort_estimate.description: Rough effort to resolve: XS (<1h), S (~half-day), M (1-2 days), L (3-5 days), XL (>1 week). Null if genuinely unknowable.

auto_fixable.description: True if the issue could be resolved by a one-line PR (e.g., bumping a version pin, removing a dead import). False for anything requiring design thought.

code_snippet.description: Optional excerpt of the offending code for reviewer context. Must be ≤10 lines. Null if the finding is structural/file-level.

allOf.description: If category is 'other', category_detail must be a non-empty string.
